fileNodes.name: cli.py
fileNodes.summary: Fire-based command-line interface for abersetz, exposing tr/config/lang/engines/setup/validate/discover subcommands and rendering results via Rich tables.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses python-fire to map a class (AbersetzCLI) and its methods onto CLI subcommands; rich.Table for terminal rendering.

fileNodes.name: config.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines the TOML-backed configuration model (defaults, credentials, engines) with load/save helpers and credential resolution from env vars or stored values.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Frozen-style dataclasses with custom __setattr__ for selector normalization; uses tomllib for reads and tomli_w for writes.

fileNodes.name: engine_catalog.py
fileNodes.summary: Central catalog of engine selectors: normalizes and resolves selector strings (e.g. tr/google, dt/deepl) and enumerates available translator and deep-translator providers.

fileNodes.name: engines.py
fileNodes.summary: Engine factory that instantiates the concrete translation engine (translators, deep_translator, lmstudio, LLM, MLX, GGUF) for a given selector and configuration.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Single create_engine dispatch function branching on selector family; uses a local OpenAI-compatible client shim.

fileNodes.name: openai_lite.py
fileNodes.summary: Minimal httpx-based OpenAI chat-completions client shim providing just the request/response surface abersetz needs, avoiding the full openai SDK dependency.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Dataclass response models plus a synchronous httpx.Client mirroring the openai SDK's chat.completions.create shape.

fileNodes.name: setup.py
fileNodes.summary: Interactive setup wizard that discovers available providers from environment variables, tests their endpoints, and generates a working abersetz configuration.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Rich Progress/Table-driven wizard; probes provider endpoints over httpx and writes a generated AbersetzConfig.

fileNodes.name: validation.py
fileNodes.summary: Validates configured engines by performing a small live sample translation against each selector and reporting success, latency, and errors.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package barrel for the translation providers, re-exporting the base engine types and every concrete engine implementation (deep_translator, gguf, llm, lmstudio, mlx, translators).
fileNodes.languageNotes: Python package __init__ acting as a re-export barrel for the provider engines.

fileNodes.name: base.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines the shared engine contract: the EngineError exception, EngineRequest/EngineResult data structures, the Engine protocol, and the EngineBase class with chunk-size resolution used by all concrete providers.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses a Protocol-style Engine contract plus dataclasses for request/result payloads.

fileNodes.name: deep_translator.py
fileNodes.summary: Engine wrapping the deep-translator library, resolving language codes against provider-supported languages with langcodes fallback and translating text with retry.

fileNodes.name: gguf.py
fileNodes.summary: Local GGUF translation engine that downloads/loads a llama.cpp model and runs chat-completion translation using the shared mthy prompt builder.

fileNodes.name: lmstudio.py
fileNodes.summary: Engine driving a local LM Studio model, ensuring the lmstudio daemon is running before invoking the loaded model for translation.

fileNodes.name: mlx.py
fileNodes.summary: Apple MLX translation engine plus shared model-resolution helpers: language mapping, mthy prompt construction, local model discovery, and Hugging Face download fallback.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Largest provider file; mixes module-level helper functions (reused by the gguf engine) with the LocalMlxEngine class.

fileNodes.name: translators.py
fileNodes.summary: Engine wrapping the translators library, dispatching HTML or plain-text translation with retry handling.

fileNodes.name: abersetz.py
fileNodes.summary: Thin public API module that re-exports the translation pipeline entry points for library consumers.

fileNodes.name: chunking.py
fileNodes.summary: Splits source text into translation-sized chunks, detecting HTML vs plain text and using semantic splitting with a length-based fallback.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses an enum (TextFormat) plus a semantic TextSplitter with a manual range-based fallback.

fileNodes.name: pipeline.py
fileNodes.summary: Core translation orchestration: discovers input files, merges options with config defaults, chunks text (incl. HTML extract/merge), invokes the selected engine with caching, and persists translated output plus vocabulary.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Combines frozen dataclass option/result types, an LRU-cached engine call, and BeautifulSoup-based HTML splitting.

fileNodes.name: tasks.py
fileNodes.summary: Higher-level convenience wrappers around translate_path that build TranslatorOptions and return simplified result mappings.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package barrel for the LLM provider, re-exporting endpoint discovery helpers and the LlmEngine inference class as the public surface of the llm subpackage.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Python package __init__ acting as a re-export barrel.

fileNodes.name: discovery.py
fileNodes.summary: Discovers OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoints from environment variables and a static catalog, fetches model lists over HTTP, and resolves provider/model selectors including wildcard patterns.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses a frozen dataclass Endpoint plus fnmatch for wildcard model selection and httpx for live model fetching.

fileNodes.name: inference.py
fileNodes.summary: Implements LlmEngine, an OpenAI chat-completions translation engine that builds prompts, invokes the model, and parses the structured text/vocabulary payload from the response.

fileNodes.name: push.yml
fileNodes.summary: GitHub Actions CI workflow triggered on pushes/PRs to main: runs Ruff lint and format checks, the pytest suite across Python 3.10-3.12, and builds distribution artifacts.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Three sequential jobs (quality -> test -> build) chained via needs; the test job uses a matrix over Python versions and uv for dependency management.

fileNodes.name: release.yml
fileNodes.summary: GitHub Actions release workflow triggered on version tags (v*): builds distributions, verifies wheel/sdist presence, publishes to PyPI via trusted publishing, and creates a GitHub Release.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses OIDC id-token permission with a pypi environment for trusted publishing and softprops/action-gh-release for release notes.

fileNodes.name: quality
fileNodes.summary: Code Quality job that runs Ruff lint (check) and Ruff format-check against the repository.

fileNodes.name: test
fileNodes.summary: Run Tests job that installs the package with test extras and executes pytest with coverage across a Python 3.10/3.11/3.12 matrix.

fileNodes.name: build
fileNodes.summary: Build Distribution job that builds sdist and wheel artifacts via python -m build and uploads them.

fileNodes.name: release
fileNodes.summary: Release to PyPI job that builds, verifies, publishes distributions to PyPI, and creates a GitHub Release.

fileNodes.name: .pre-commit-config.yaml
fileNodes.summary: Pre-commit hook configuration wiring ruff linting and formatting into the git commit workflow.

fileNodes.name: AGENTS.md
fileNodes.summary: AI-assistant development guidelines covering chain-of-thought reasoning, verification workflow, anti-bloat rules, and project conventions for agents working on abersetz.

fileNodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
fileNodes.summary: Accumulative release notes documenting feature additions, fixes, and version history of abersetz.

fileNodes.name: CLAUDE.md
fileNodes.summary: Claude-specific development guidelines, near-identical to AGENTS.md, defining CoT reasoning, verification, and anti-overcomplication rules.

fileNodes.name: DEPENDENCIES.md
fileNodes.summary: Lists the project's package dependencies with rationale for why each was chosen.

fileNodes.name: GEMINI.md
fileNodes.summary: Gemini-specific development guidelines, near-identical to AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md, defining AI collaboration conventions.

fileNodes.name: IDEA.md
fileNodes.summary: Conceptual notes and original idea sketch describing the motivation and high-level design of abersetz.

fileNodes.name: LLXPRT.md
fileNodes.summary: LLxprt-specific development guidelines, near-identical to AGENTS.md, defining AI collaboration conventions.

fileNodes.name: QWEN.md
fileNodes.summary: Qwen-specific development guidelines, near-identical to AGENTS.md, defining AI collaboration conventions.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Project overview explaining what abersetz does, with usage examples for translating directories of text and Markdown files via AI engines.

fileNodes.name: SPEC.md
fileNodes.summary: Technical specification describing the architecture, pipeline stages, and engine interfaces of abersetz.

fileNodes.name: TASKS.md
fileNodes.summary: Detailed future goals and planned work for abersetz with specific implementation specifics.

fileNodes.name: TESTING.md
fileNodes.summary: Testing strategy and instructions covering unit, integration, and functional example-based tests.

fileNodes.name: TODO.md
fileNodes.summary: Flat itemized checklist representation of the TASKS.md roadmap.

fileNodes.name: WORK.md
fileNodes.summary: Work progress log capturing iteration notes, test results, and next steps across the development of abersetz.

fileNodes.name: package.toml
fileNodes.summary: Project scaffolding configuration toggling CLI, logging, Pydantic, Rich, VCS, and GitHub Actions features.

fileNodes.name: pyproject.toml
fileNodes.summary: Python project manifest defining build system (hatch-vcs), dependencies, CLI entry point, and tool configuration (ruff, pytest, mypy).

fileNodes.name: build.sh
fileNodes.summary: Build script that lints, formats, runs tests, and builds the abersetz package via uv/hatch.

fileNodes.name: install.sh
fileNodes.summary: Installation script performing an editable local install of abersetz via uv pip.

fileNodes.name: publish.sh
fileNodes.summary: Release script that cleans builds, runs build.sh and install.sh, tags the next version, and publishes the package to PyPI.

fileNodes.name: _config.yml
fileNodes.summary: Jekyll site configuration for the abersetz GitHub Pages documentation, using the just-the-docs remote theme with search and navigation enabled.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses remote_theme (just-the-docs) rather than a vendored theme, keeping the docs repo lean.

fileNodes.name: api.md
fileNodes.summary: Python API reference documenting the programmatic translation interface, primarily the translate_path entry point and supporting types from the abersetz package.

fileNodes.name: cli.md
fileNodes.summary: CLI reference describing the abersetz and abtr commands and subcommands (tr, validate, config, engines, version) exposed by the command-line interface.

fileNodes.name: configuration.md
fileNodes.summary: Configuration guide explaining the TOML config file managed by platformdirs, its structure, defaults, and engine settings.

fileNodes.name: index.md
fileNodes.summary: Documentation home page introducing abersetz, its value proposition, and getting-started entry points for the documentation site.

fileNodes.name: installation.md
fileNodes.summary: Installation guide covering requirements (Python 3.10+) and installation via pip or uv package managers.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Usage guide for the translation engine benchmark suite, documenting how to run examples/benchmark.py with its --engines, --dry-run, --force and related options, and describing the poem and FontLab test documents.

fileNodes.name: benchmark_results.json
fileNodes.summary: Persisted machine-readable benchmark output produced by examples/benchmark.py, recording per-engine translation speed, throughput, and success/failure metrics across the test documents.

fileNodes.name: benchmark_results.md
fileNodes.summary: Narrative analysis of the translation engine benchmark, comparing local MLX vs GGUF backends, model sizes, and cataloguing failure modes (API length limits, volume/path errors, network timeouts, LM Studio connectivity).

fileNodes.name: fontlab-7-tldr.en.md
fileNodes.summary: English source fixture: a 20-chapter FontLab 7 overview used as sample input for the translation pipeline's example/benchmark runs.

fileNodes.name: fontlab-7-tldr.pl--dt-google.md
fileNodes.summary: Polish translation of the FontLab 7 overview produced via the deep-translator Google engine, kept as an example output fixture.

fileNodes.name: fontlab-7-tldr.pl--mthy-mlx-1.8b-mlx.md
fileNodes.summary: Polish translation of the FontLab 7 overview produced by the local MLX 1.8b model engine, kept as an example output fixture.

fileNodes.name: fontlab-7-tldr.pl--tr-google.md
fileNodes.summary: Polish translation of the FontLab 7 overview produced via the translators Google engine, kept as an example output fixture.

fileNodes.name: poem.en.md
fileNodes.summary: English source poem used as the input fixture for translation examples and tests.

fileNodes.name: poem.pl--dt-google.md
fileNodes.summary: Polish translation of the sample poem produced via the deep-translator Google engine, kept as an example output fixture.

fileNodes.name: poem.pl--mthy-gguf-1.8b-gguf.md
fileNodes.summary: Polish translation of the sample poem produced via the GGUF 1.8B local model engine, kept as an example output fixture.

fileNodes.name: poem.pl--mthy-mlx-1.8b-mlx.md
fileNodes.summary: Polish translation of the sample poem produced via the MLX 1.8B local model engine, kept as an example output fixture.

fileNodes.name: poem.pl--tr-google.md
fileNodes.summary: Polish translation of the sample poem produced via the translators (tr) Google engine, kept as an example output fixture.

fileNodes.name: codegraph.mdc
fileNodes.summary: Cursor editor rule documenting when and how to use the CodeGraph MCP tools for code intelligence in this repository.

fileNodes.name: .understandignore
fileNodes.summary: Ignore-pattern manifest excluding build artifacts, caches, and vendored files from the understand-anything codebase analysis.

fileNodes.name: benchmark.py
fileNodes.summary: Runnable benchmark harness that resolves engine/provider selectors, translates sample documents through abersetz, and reports timing and output statistics in a rich table.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses fire for CLI dispatch and unittest.mock.patch to swap in dummy engines for deterministic timing.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package root that lazily exposes the public API (translate_path, TranslatorOptions, etc.) via module __getattr__ and resolves the package version.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Uses PEP 562 module-level __getattr__ for lazy imports to keep import time low.

fileNodes.name: __main__.py
fileNodes.summary: Module execution entry point that delegates to the fast CLI main when the package is run with python -m abersetz.

fileNodes.name: cli_fast.py
fileNodes.summary: Lightweight CLI front-end that short-circuits --version without importing the heavy CLI module, otherwise delegating to the full Fire-based CLI.

fileNodes.name: anthropic.py
fileNodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring Anthropic API base URL, API key env var, and known Claude model identifiers.

fileNodes.name: deepseek.py
fileNodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring DeepSeek API endpoint, key env var, and known model identifiers.

fileNodes.name: gemini.py
fileNodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring Google Gemini's OpenAI-compatible endpoint, key env var, and known model identifiers.

fileNodes.name: groq.py
fileNodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring Groq API endpoint, key env var, and known model identifiers.

fileNodes.name: lmstudio.py
fileNodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring the local LM Studio OpenAI-compatible endpoint and key settings.

fileNodes.name: openai.py
fileNodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring OpenAI API base URL, key env var, and known GPT model identifiers.

fileNodes.name: openrouter.py
fileNodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring OpenRouter aggregation endpoint, key env var, and known model identifiers.

fileNodes.name: siliconflow.py
fileNodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring SiliconFlow API endpoint, key env var, and known model identifiers.

fileNodes.name: together.py
fileNodes.summary: Provider descriptor module declaring Together AI API endpoint, key env var, and known model identifiers.

fileNodes.name: local_discovery.py
fileNodes.summary: Discovers locally installed GGUF/MLX models across LM Studio and other app directories, returning structured LocalModel records.

fileNodes.name: recommended_settings.json
fileNodes.summary: Per-provider recommended default settings (model, parameters) for OpenAI, SiliconFlow, Groq, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Gemini, plus a default fallback.

fileNodes.name: conftest.py
fileNodes.summary: Pytest fixtures and autouse setup: mocks the bcache decorator with a hashable-args cache, isolates the config dir to tmp_path, and clears caches between tests.

fileNodes.name: test_chunking.py
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for text chunking and format detection, including round-trip preservation and a fallback path when the semantic splitter is unavailable.

fileNodes.name: test_cli.py
fileNodes.summary: Extensive CLI test suite covering argument wiring, option building, engine/validation entry collection, config commands, and Fire invocation.

fileNodes.name: test_config.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for configuration loading, defaults, and persistence behavior.

fileNodes.name: test_engine_catalog.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for the engine catalog that enumerates and resolves available translation engines.

fileNodes.name: test_engines.py
fileNodes.summary: Large test suite exercising translation engine creation, selection normalization, and provider behavior.

fileNodes.name: test_examples.py
fileNodes.summary: Functional tests validating that the bundled example scripts (including the benchmark) run end-to-end.

fileNodes.name: test_htmladapt_twat.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for HTML adaptation handling used during translation of markup content.

fileNodes.name: test_integration.py
fileNodes.summary: Integration tests exercising real translation engines (translators, deep-translator, ullm) plus file/HTML/batch translation and network-failure retry behavior.

fileNodes.name: test_local_discovery.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for local model discovery, verifying the model finder scans correctly and resolves local GGUF and MLX situation models.

fileNodes.name: test_offline.py
fileNodes.summary: Offline-mode tests confirming dry-run, empty-file handling, imports, and edge-case file processing all work without network access.

fileNodes.name: test_openai_lite.py
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for the lightweight OpenAI chat-completions client, validating response parsing and HTTP error handling via dummy client stubs.

fileNodes.name: test_package.py
fileNodes.summary: Smoke test verifying package-level dynamic attribute access rejects unknown symbols.

fileNodes.name: test_pipeline.py
fileNodes.summary: Comprehensive tests for the translation pipeline's translate_path, covering chunk sizing, HTML handling, mixed formats, write modes, dry-run, and large-file warnings.

fileNodes.name: test_setup.py
fileNodes.summary: Extensive tests for the setup wizard: provider discovery, config generation, endpoint testing, validation, default-engine selection, and interactive run flow.

fileNodes.name: test_validation.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for engine validation logic, covering result collection, failure handling, selector limits, empty-translation flagging, and selector extraction from config.
